message:
deps,refactor(connectors): migrate cursor/opencode/goose/hermes from rusqlite to frankensqlite

Replace rusqlite with frankensqlite across every SQLite-backed
connector, aligning with AGENTS.md RULE 2 ("NEVER use rusqlite —
frankensqlite ONLY") that was previously satisfied only by the crush
connector. This closes the last outstanding rusqlite usages in the
crate and drops the rusqlite dep entirely.

Cargo.toml
- Remove `rusqlite = { version = "0.38", optional = true,
  features = ["bundled", "modern_sqlite"] }` — no remaining call
  sites after this commit.
- The existing optional
  `frankensqlite = { git = "…", rev = "e3f57c9a", package = "fsqlite",
  optional = true }` is now the only SQLite backend.
- Feature flags for cursor / opencode / goose / hermes flip from
  `dep:rusqlite` to `dep:frankensqlite`; crush unchanged (already
  frankensqlite).
- Cleaned up the optional-deps section header comment: the two
  separate rusqlite-vs-frankensqlite comment blocks collapse into
  one "SQLite-backed session databases" block now that there's
  only one backend.

Per-connector changes follow the same mechanical pattern:
- `use rusqlite::Connection` →
  `use frankensqlite::compat::{ConnectionExt, OpenFlags, RowExt,
                               open_with_flags};
   use frankensqlite::{Connection, params};`
  (the `compat` module provides rusqlite-API-shaped wrappers so the
  rewrite can proceed top-to-bottom without a full API redesign per
  connector).
- `conn.prepare(...).unwrap().query_map([..], closure)` folds into
  the new `conn.query_map_collect(sql, params![...], closure)`
  helper, which returns `Result<Vec<T>>` directly — this eliminates
  the nested `Result<Rows>` → `for row in rows.flatten()` dance that
  every connector had.
- `row.get::<_, String>(0)?` → `row.get_typed::<String>(0)?`,
  matching frankensqlite's column-access API.
- OpenFlags carry over via the compat re-export so read-only DB
  opens stay read-only (prevents accidental writes to the sibling
  agent's session DB).

src/connectors/crush.rs
- Only change is a docstring trim: "uses `frankensqlite` — NOT
  rusqlite" collapses to "uses `frankensqlite`" now that rusqlite
  is dead code everywhere.

src/connectors/cursor.rs
- cursorDiskKV bubble lookup migrated.

src/connectors/opencode.rs
- v1.2+ opencode.db message extraction migrated; also handles the
  nested `data.content` case f4f9061 introduced (preserves the
  fallback path ordering).

src/connectors/goose.rs
- sessions.db session + message query migrated.

src/connectors/hermes.rs
- Hermes Agent state.db migrated.

No behaviour changes — every connector reads the same columns from
the same tables with the same filters; only the underlying driver
changes. This also brings the ort/sha2/transitive story in line with
the rest of the flywheel: no more rusqlite-bundled libsqlite3 in
consumer binaries, one SQLite implementation across the stack.

files.patch:
@@ -32,10 +32,7 @@ urlencoding = { version = "2", optional = true }
 aes-gcm = { version = "0.10", optional = true }
 base64 = { version = "0.22", optional = true }
 
-# --- Optional: Cursor/OpenCode SQLite session databases ---
-rusqlite = { version = "0.38", optional = true, features = ["bundled", "modern_sqlite"] }
-
-# --- Optional: frankensqlite for new connectors (Crush, etc.) ---
+# --- Optional: SQLite-backed session databases ---
 frankensqlite = { git = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankensqlite", rev = "e3f57c9a", package = "fsqlite", optional = true }
 
 [features]
@@ -53,14 +50,14 @@ connectors = [
 # ChatGPT: AES-256-GCM decryption for v2/v3 encrypted conversations
 chatgpt = ["connectors", "dep:aes-gcm", "dep:base64"]
 # Cursor: SQLite database access for state.vscdb
-cursor = ["connectors", "dep:rusqlite", "dep:urlencoding"]
+cursor = ["connectors", "dep:frankensqlite", "dep:urlencoding"]
 # OpenCode: SQLite database access for v1.2+ opencode.db
-opencode = ["connectors", "dep:rusqlite", "dep:urlencoding"]
+opencode = ["connectors", "dep:frankensqlite", "dep:urlencoding"]
 # Goose: SQLite database access for Goose sessions.db
-goose = ["connectors", "dep:rusqlite", "dep:urlencoding"]
+goose = ["connectors", "dep:frankensqlite", "dep:urlencoding"]
 # Hermes: SQLite database access for Hermes Agent state.db
-hermes = ["connectors", "dep:rusqlite", "dep:urlencoding"]
-# Crush: SQLite database access for Charm's Crush agent (uses frankensqlite)
+hermes = ["connectors", "dep:frankensqlite", "dep:urlencoding"]
+# Crush: SQLite database access for Charm's Crush agent
 crush = ["connectors", "dep:frankensqlite"]
 # All connectors enabled
 all-connectors = ["connectors", "chatgpt", "cursor", "opencode", "goose", "hermes", "crush"]
